unarmored.description: No armor. You rely on your agility and luck.

padded.description: Quilted layers of cloth and batting. Basic protection.

leather.description: Standard leather armor used by scouts and rogues.

studded_leather.description: Made from tough but flexible leather, studded leather is reinforced with close-set rivets or spikes.

dark_leather.description: Studded leather, dyed black and enchanted to provide extra protection.

assassin_leather.description: Enchanted leather armor providing unparallelled stealth and protection.

hide_armor.description: Rugged armor made from the hides of wild beasts.

chain_shirt.description: Made of interlocking metal rings, a chain shirt is worn between layers of clothing or leather.

breastplate.description: This armor consists of a fitted metal chest piece worn with supple leather.

half_plate.description: Half plate consists of shaped metal plates that cover most of the wearer's body.

ring_mail.description: This armor is leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it.

chainmail.description: A complete suit of chain mail, providing excellent protection.

splint.description: This armor is made of narrow vertical strips of metal riveted to a backing of leather.

plate.description: Plate consists of shaped, interlocking metal plates to cover the entire body.

novice_robe.description: A basic robe for apprentices. Improves spell success and resistance.

adept_robe.description: A finely woven robe for experienced casters. Noticeable spell boost.

archmage_robe.description: A powerful robe crackling with energy. Greatly increases spell success, resistance and Damage.

monk_wraps.description: Simple linen wraps that aid in focus. Increases Stamina.

ascendant_wraps.description: Simple linen wraps that aid in focus. Increases Stamina.

grandmaster_wraps.description: Simple linen wraps that aid in focus. Increases Stamina.
